title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at GKB Opticals

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at GKB Opticals
jsonLd.description:
Join the GKB Opticals family as a SEO Specialist in Kolkata. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About GKB Opticals:
GKB Opticals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GKB Opticals!
